body.title: CLOSED: wire librarian MCP server into CC workflow
body.result: librarian MCP wired via ~/.mcp.json; optional research/summarize steps added to context-load (5.8) and sprint-ticket (step 5)
body.description:
The Librarian device already has a running MCP server with research + summarize tools. Wire it into CC's active MCP config so context-load and sprint-ticket can call librarian.research() and librarian.summarize() directly. Add librarian MCP entry to `~/.claude/settings.json` mcpServers. Update /context-load to optionally call `librarian.research()` for session briefing enrichment. Update /sprint-ticket Step 5 (infrastructure brief) to optionally call `librarian.summarize()` for relevant context.

**Affected files:** `~/.claude/settings.json` (mcpServers entry), `/home/akien/.claude/skills/context-load` (optional librarian call), `/home/akien/.claude/skills/sprint-ticket` (optional librarian call in Step 5)
**Design rules:** graceful degradation — all librarian MCP calls degrade to skip if librarian is offline; no blocking on librarian availability; MCP call wrapped in try/except with silent fallback
**Scope boundary:** IN — MCP registration, context-load briefing call, sprint-ticket Step 5 call. OUT — no new librarian tools (uses existing research + summarize), no changes to librarian device itself.
**Test plan:** mcp__librarian__research callable from CC session when librarian running; context-load runs without error when librarian offline (graceful skip); sprint-ticket Step 5 includes librarian summary when available
